quick_reference.logline: When a donor family's star freshman and the brother of the boy he once helped destroy fake a relationship to contain a campus scandal, they uncover an abuse archive that can either save a sister or burn the whole hockey empire down.
quick_reference.genre: Queer Campus Scandal Romance / Enemies to Lovers / Fake Dating
quick_reference.protagonist_snapshot: Ezra turns truth into a weapon; Cade turns survival into a choice.

world_background: St. Brendan College is an elite Catholic hockey campus where donor money, school branding, and family image turn private harm into public silence. The adaptation treats rumor, hearings, donor events, and rink politics as the visible machinery of control.

timeline.event: Noah Quinn is assaulted inside a purity-policed hockey culture and the school buries the incident.
Cade Mercer becomes the perfect son on paper in order to shield June from the family system.
Ezra Quinn begins quietly collecting traces of the old athletics cover-up.
A donor-run collision and a stolen flash drive collapse romance, scandal, and evidence into one story engine.

character_profiles.name: Ezra Quinn
character_profiles.hidden_identity: Noah Quinn's brother and active investigator
character_profiles.core_desire: Expose the system without surrendering control
character_profiles.core_fear: Being emotionally owned by the person he lets closest
character_profiles.visual_design: black coats, silver headphones, editorial severity
character_profiles.relationship_notes: Begins from verbal superiority; gets destabilized by Cade's honesty under pressure.

character_profiles.name: Cade Mercer
character_profiles.hidden_identity: closeted abuse survivor protecting his sister
character_profiles.core_desire: Keep June safe and become a self-directed person
character_profiles.core_fear: That wanting love will cost someone else safety
character_profiles.visual_design: clean athletic prestige with visible bruise logic
character_profiles.relationship_notes: Pressure vessel whose silence reads as betrayal until the coercion is exposed.

character_profiles.name: Pastor Daniel Mercer
character_profiles.hidden_identity: violent controller protecting image with religion
character_profiles.core_desire: Preserve family and school narrative control
character_profiles.visual_design: blackcoat power, expensive normalcy, moral menace
character_profiles.relationship_notes: He must feel most dangerous when he appears reasonable.

character_profiles.name: June Mercer
character_profiles.public_identity: pastor's daughter and school-facing good girl
character_profiles.core_desire: Get out alive with her brother
character_profiles.visual_design: oversized hoodie layers and bruised innocence

character_profiles.name: Milo Hart
character_profiles.core_desire: Protect players without protecting the lie
character_profiles.visual_design: captain utility wear and rink-worn textures
character_profiles.relationship_notes: Validates Cade inside the hockey world.

character_profiles.name: Tessa Vale
character_profiles.core_desire: Keep Ezra alive long enough to win
character_profiles.visual_design: bright accent accessories in cold campus palettes

character_profiles.name: Noah Quinn
character_profiles.voice_style: steady, spare, older than his age
character_profiles.visual_design: muted civilian winter with permanent stillness
character_profiles.relationship_notes: Adds moral gravity and final proof.

location_profiles.name: Riverside Donor Runway / Footbridge
location_profiles.dramatic_function: collision site, confession bridge, runner intimacy zone
location_profiles.asset_notes: Must support both public rumor and private vulnerability.

location_profiles.name: Crowbar Coffee & Book Bar
location_profiles.dramatic_function: fake-date showcase and softest recurring refuge
location_profiles.asset_notes: Warmest set, but still sharp rather than cozy-sweet.

location_profiles.name: St. Brendan Rink / Tunnel / Arena Bowl
location_profiles.dramatic_function: masculinity pressure engine and final payoff arena
location_profiles.asset_notes: One hero build should cover tunnel, locker adjacency, and bowl views.

location_profiles.name: Mercer House / Church Office
location_profiles.dramatic_function: origin of fear and rescue site
location_profiles.asset_notes: Home and church should bleed into the same power texture.

location_profiles.name: Athletics Hearing Room / Donor Event Hall
location_profiles.dramatic_function: public judgment venue and reversal stage

location_profiles.name: Off-Campus Inn Safehouse / Hospital Utility Interior
location_profiles.dramatic_function: temporary refuge and stripped-down recovery zone
location_profiles.asset_notes: Use as the season's low-budget honesty zone.

prop_profiles.name: Discipline Archive Flash Drive
prop_profiles.visual_description: matte black drive with a cracked red label

prop_profiles.name: Noah Helmet-Cam Card
prop_profiles.visual_description: scratched memory card inside a taped envelope

prop_profiles.name: Ezra's Black Notebook
prop_profiles.story_function: thought map and author identity marker
prop_profiles.visual_description: soft black notebook swollen with tabs and loose paper

prop_profiles.name: June's Burner Phone
prop_profiles.story_function: panic relay and covert coordination tool
prop_profiles.visual_description: cheap prepaid phone in a pink zip pouch

visual_system: Public spaces should look funded, polished, and unsafe. Ezra's frames favor black, graphite, silver, and controlled stillness. Cade's frames favor navy, steel, bruised skin, and restraint under pressure. The Mercer power world reads black, oxblood, polished wood, and church authority. Safehouse moments warm up through imperfect practical light rather than sentimentality.
continuity_rules: Cade's bruises must progress logically after each violence beat.
Ezra should visibly carry PROP-04 or recording gear when in work mode.
PROP-01 and PROP-03 must remain visually distinct.
Daniel must never look disordered in public.
June's fear should register physically before verbally.
Public fake-dating beats must block differently from private honest beats.
The rink must remain the coldest-feeling recurring environment.

ai_asset_matrix.prompt_seed: sharp male campus journalist in black winter layers, silver headphones, cold editorial beauty
elite freshman hockey forward in navy compression layers, bruised knuckles, controlled tension
wealthy church patriarch in black overcoat, calm menace, polished donor authority
premium college hockey arena tunnel and bowl, blue-white glare, cold prestige
ai_asset_matrix.must_have: scoreboard visibility, tunnel pressure, pro texture

setting_bible_markdown: # 04_英文设定集\n\nFull setting bible maintained in companion markdown file `04_英文设定集.md`.
